property.description: A rare opportunity in the coveted Beverly Hills Flats, 800 Cinthia St offers exceptional potential on a generous lot in one of the city's most desirable residential enclaves. Built in 1950, the property presents a compelling canvas for an owner-user seeking to create a personalized Beverly Hills residence or for a buyer with vision to enhance the home's aesthetic value and unlock its full potential. Ideally situated near world-class shopping, dining, hotels and amenities, this address offers the privacy, scale and location that define enduring Beverly Hills appeal. Buyer to independently verify all square footage, bed/bath count, permits, lot size, zoning and development possibilities. listing agent is related to the owner.

Alpine Ranch, located on one of the most prestigious streets in Beverly Hills, is a gated, custom-built Italian Villa originally designed by acclaimed architects Luis Ortega and Jose Fernandez. It has been fully reimagined as a brand-new home, impeccably redesigned and furnished by Amber Interiors. Every detail of this 5-bed, 5-bath estate has been thoughtfully upgraded, from fully renovated bathrooms, bedrooms, and living spaces to a comprehensive redesign by Amber Interiors. Their curated touches include bespoke furnishings, hand-thrown ceramics, artfully stacked books, and carefully layered textiles all included in the sale for a true turnkey experience. Interior highlights blend rustic charm with refined elegance, including exposed wood beam ceilings, steel-framed windows, and natural stone accents reminiscent of a countryside villa in the South of France. The main level is thoughtfully laid out with a sunlit formal living room that opens to a serene outdoor patio, an inviting dining room, and a chef's kitchen outfitted with Wolf appliances. Four bedrooms are located on this level, including a private primary wing that serves as a true retreat, featuring garden and pool views, a spa-quality bath with rain shower, freestanding tub, and overhead skylights that bathe the space in natural light. Upstairs, a separate private casita and an additional flex bedroom or gym open onto a generous covered balcony and rooftop deck. Set behind gates, the grounds are just as captivating as the interiors. A sprawling motor court offers ample parking for guests, while the expansive grassy yard, resort-style pool, and sun-drenched cabana invite effortless indoor-outdoor living. Thoughtful details like a private outdoor shower and a dedicated pool bathroom add both convenience and charm, creating a true sanctuary for relaxation and entertaining under the California sun.Just moments from the Beverly Hills Hotel and the world-class shopping, dining, and entertainment of Rodeo Drive, Alpine Ranch is a rare opportunity to own a fully furnished, design-forward estate in one of the most iconic neighborhoods in the world.

The Maybourne Beverly Hills is highly regarded as the most prestigious address in Los Angeles. Situated on the 7th floor of the iconic Spanish Colonial Revival-style hotel, this nearly 5,000-square-foot residence offers the ultimate luxury lifestyle with exclusive concierge services and unparalleled access to Beverly Hills' world-renowned shopping and restaurants. As one of the largest residences in the building, this pristine 4-bedroom, 4.5-bath home is defined by grand scale, timeless elegance, and impeccable craftsmanship throughout. Designed with sophisticated warm, classic contemporary finishes, the residence features expansive living and dining rooms ideal for both intimate living and elevated entertaining, soaring 10-foot ceilings, a private media room, gourmet chef's kitchen, and four beautifully appointed en suite bedrooms, including a sumptuous primary suite designed as a private retreat. A rare and coveted feature exclusive to this residence, the primary suite boasts spacious separate his and hers bathrooms and dressing areas - an exceptional luxury not commonly found in other units within the building. Private balconies showcase dramatic views of the surrounding hills and sparkling cityscape, bringing warmth and natural light into every corner of the home. Rich textures, refined materials, and exquisitely curated interiors create an atmosphere of understated glamour and serenity. With only 20 residences in the building, opportunities to own in this prestigious location are very rare. Residents enjoy an unmatched level of privacy and service, featuring a dedicated residential elevator, state-of-the-art security system, valet, concierge, housekeeping services, rooftop pool and cabanas, spa and wellness facilities, fitness center, and the full services and amenities of The Maybourne Hotel. Elegant, private, and effortlessly refined, Residence 7D is a rare offering that embodies the very best of Beverly Hills luxury living.

Set high in the hills above Los Angeles, this newly completed Beverly Hills estate represents six years of precision planning and expert craftsmanship, framed by sweeping 180-degree southern views that stretch from the Pacific Ocean to the shimmering city skyline. 9966 brings together best-in-class materials, advanced systems, and resort-caliber amenities across three thoughtfully designed levels, resting on more than two and a half acres of manicured grounds. Through a gated drive and behind custom steel-framed doors awaits 15,700 square feet of meticulously crafted living space, featuring rare rift-sawn white oak flooring, a limestone fireplace, and oversized custom windows that flood the home with natural light. The Bulthaup-designed kitchen is outfitted entirely with Gaggenau appliances, while a Crestron-controlled environment seamlessly manages the home's audio system. A climate-controlled wine room with display shelving for up to 640 bottles serves as both a collector's showcase and an architectural focal point. In addition to the interior living space, the estate offers more than 7,200 square feet of outdoor terraces, designed for dining, lounging, and entertaining against a stunning backdrop of sweeping views. A sculptural staircase and elevator lead to the upper floor, where the primary suite features dual bathrooms, dual walk-in closets, and commanding panoramic vistas. Additional spaces include multiple guest suites, a glam room, art studio, massage room, full gym, and an acoustically engineered Dolby Atmos theater. A 23-zone RVR HVAC system by Daikin provides precision climate control, allowing every room to maintain its own ideal temperature. Outdoors, the amenities continue with a 52-foot pool, private tennis court, and carefully maintained green spaces. Rarely does a property in Beverly Hills offer this level of infrastructure, privacy, and architectural clarity, making 9966 a true testament to timeless luxury and modern design.

The Angelo Estate, designed by famed master architect, Ed Tuttle. The most spectacular contemporary estate in Los Angeles, truly one of the great estates in all of America. Perched on a 6-acre view promontory with unobstructed views across the entire Los Angeles basin from downtown to the ocean. Enter through a long gated private driveway to this museum quality stunning architectural masterpiece comprised of steel, glass, and limestone with onsite parking for 80-100 cars. The main house is built around a magnificent open courtyard with fountains. Enter an atrium foyer filled with natural light and reminiscent of IM Pei's Louvre installation. There are high ceilings and great walls for art throughout, a beautiful living room, formal dining, library, chef's gourmet kitchen, great room, incredible theatre, game room, bowling alley, wellness center, gym, wine cellar, and much more. Built by McCoy Construction with meticulous detail and perfection, there was no expense spared and no detail overlooked. All exterior walls are made of imported Italian limestone, while the interior walls and ceilings feature either the same limestone or rift-cut vertical grain white oak. The estate also includes state-of-the-art electronics and security with a security room. The house is heated and cooled by geothermal technology and has solar panels and a generator. Spectacular grounds include a green marble tiled infinity pool and spa, a full outdoor kitchen, a lighted tennis court and pavilion, stunning lawns, walkways, and gardens. There is a full 2-story 2-bedroom guest house and a separate guest apartment. The home is on a peninsula, not only ensuring privacy but opening to possibly the best view in all of Los Angeles. 16 bedrooms, 27 bathrooms, 18 fireplaces. This home is a true wonder, there is nothing else like it, and impossible to duplicate. Be sure to look at both interior and exterior photos, along with the dramatic drone shots on the property website. Shown to pre-qualified clients only.

Welcome to 1620 Carla Ridge, an extraordinary contemporary estate in the prestigious Trousdale neighborhood of Beverly Hills, designed by renowned architect Paul McLean. Set behind a dramatic 12-foot glass gate, this architectural masterpiece offers approximately 10,000 square feet of sophisticated living space with 6 bedrooms, 9 bathrooms, and breathtaking panoramic views from the city skyline to the Pacific Ocean. Thoughtfully designed to maximize natural light while preserving the site's topography, the home features a striking glass-enclosed atrium and cascading water feature that illuminate the lower level's entertainment spaces and secondary bedroom suites. The upper level showcases the primary suite, two additional bedrooms, formal and casual living areas, and a chef's SieMatic kitchen, all seamlessly connected to the resort-style backyard.Exceptional amenities include a state-of-the-art Crestron smart home system, private theater, game room with bar, wine cellar, gym with steam room, Zen courtyard, infinity-edge pool, spa, and outdoor BBQ area. Ideally located just minutes from Rodeo Drive, world-class dining, luxury shopping, and entertainment, this residence offers the ultimate in privacy, luxury, and modern California living.  Also available for Lease $80,000/month.

The Rutherford House is a masterpiece of architectural design, showcasing unparalleled quality and attention to detail. Located on the most desirable street in Beverly Hills, the one-of-a-kind residence blends old Hollywood with modern luxury. Upon entering the grand entrance, guests are greeted by a classic, winding staircase and a magnificent view that reveals the impressive back grounds. The main level features a formal living and dining room, Ruhlmann-inspired library and billiard room, bar, and grand morning room lined with 18th-century wallpaper and original fireplace. The kitchen is functional yet breathtaking with decadent marble, mosaic-tiled ceiling, and top-of-the-line appliances. A primary suite features marble bathrooms, oversized closets, and a separate lounge area that overlooks a manicured garden. Outside is a pavilion with an oval pool and pool house inspired by Paul Williams' remarkable design. With many more features throughout, this iconic estate must be experienced to be believed. Step into timeless elegance and rich history with the Rutherford House.

Poised high atop a promontory, this palatial European Estate boasts jaw-dropping 360 degree views of all of Los Angeles. Rich in privacy behind gates and up the long tree-lined driveway, this fortress of unparalleled magnitude is revealed. Situated in a world of its own overlooking the stunning gardens and city, this home is the epitome of royal living in the most sought-after city in the country. High ceilings, ornate details and grand-scale rooms are showcased beyond the luxurious foyer and Imperial Staircase through the massive double door entrance. Highlights from the main floor include an industrial grade chef's kitchen with an adjacent light and bright breakfast room, a formal dining room with double doors made with Venetian stained glass windows, an impressive living room with a gorgeous bar and fireplace, a billiards room, and a formal sitting room. Among the many jewels of this home is the two story library which includes a steel spiral staircase and a vibrant irreplaceable stained glass light fixture. Upstairs, the master bedroom rivals that of a European castle with multiple private terraces, city and nature views, his and hers closets, a massage room and a luxurious bathroom made with lapis stone. In addition to the master suite there are four oversized en suite bedrooms each with beautiful views and walk in closets. The lower level is an entertainer's paradise with a theater, ballroom that opens up to a sprawling terrace where your guests can soak in the picturesque views, and a wine cellar that's authentically outfitted as the storefront of an early 18th century English saloon. The backyard consists of a sparkling pool and spa, outdoor kitchen, putting green, a fruit and vegetable garden, tennis court, koi pond, and endless places for dining al fresco. In addition to the various amenities, the home is also equipped with an oversized gym. This tranquil oasis is quintessential to the highest class of luxury living, built for those who hold history, design, and beauty in the highest regard.

Representing the pinnacle of contemporary luxury, this newly constructed custom estate by Bowery Design Group is ideally positioned on one of the most coveted streets in the prestigious Beverly Hills Flats. Thoughtfully designed to balance grand-scale entertaining with refined everyday living, the residence features seven bedrooms, a private office, and ten bathrooms across an expansive yet highly functional floor plan. The main level immediately establishes a sense of sophistication and warmth, showcasing elegant formal living and dining rooms, an oversized family room, and a richly appointed private office. At the heart of the home lies a spectacular chef's kitchen designed for both culinary performance and effortless entertaining, complemented by a fully equipped secondary prep kitchen featuring a professional-grade gas range, additional refrigeration, and dedicated service space for large-scale hosting. The lower level unfolds into a true private resort and entertainment destination. A state-of-the-art home theater, fully equipped fitness studio, steam room, entertainment lounge, and an exceptional open-sky patio create an atmosphere rarely found in residential design at this level. Thoughtfully integrated into the lower level, the private outdoor patio offers a sophisticated retreat ideal for cigar enthusiasts, evening gatherings, or quiet moments beneath the open air. Designed for seamless indoor-outdoor living, the grounds are equally impressive. A resort-style swimming pool is paired with a detached pool house featuring its own private sauna, creating a tranquil wellness escape framed by beautifully curated landscaping and multiple areas for relaxation and entertaining. Every finish throughout the estate was selected with exceptional care and timeless sensibility. Wide-plank white oak flooring and custom white oak doors provide warmth and continuity, while curated stone surfaces of marble, travertine, and limestone introduce texture and understated elegance. Hand-applied premium Oikos decorative plaster walls add depth, softness, and an artisanal character rarely found in newly constructed homes. For the automotive enthusiast or discerning collector, the property offers a secure six-car garage in addition to a separate two-car motor court. Approved plans to expand the garage by approximately 360 square feet present an exceptional opportunity to create a private poker lounge, bespoke wine cellar, luxury tasting room, collector's vault, or additional showroom-style storage tailored to the next owner's vision. A rare offering in the heart of Beverly Hills, this turnkey architectural estate seamlessly combines world-class design, resort-caliber amenities, and one of Los Angeles' most prestigious locations into a residence of exceptional quality and distinction.

Set at the top of Trousdale, this unparalleled estate is a bold exploration of raw precision, industrial elegance, and sculptural architecture, all while capturing sweeping 180-degree southern views. Designed and built by the acclaimed ID Group, the home centers around a circular motor court enveloped by rhythmic board-formed concrete. Monolithic walls serve as both privacy buffers and dynamic light sculptures, casting dancing shadows from sunrise to dusk. Inside, the architectural intent continues with oversized concrete volumes, perforated metal ceilings, and brushed steel detailing. Framed views of the city and ocean command attention, most dramatically from the main living room, where a retractable glass wall opens to an infinity-edge pool and a horizon that stretches across the Los Angeles skyline. One of the home's most striking features, a fully exposed concept motorcycle, is installed beneath a skylit entry, serving as a dramatic showpiece. Skylights and deep architectural reveals filter daylight through the interiors, creating a constantly shifting interplay of light and shadow. Resort-caliber amenities include a state-of-the-art theater, a spa-inspired primary bath, manicured grounds, walk-in humidor, and meticulously curated one-of-a-kind fixtures. Every element of the home, from its structural form to its bespoke finishes, has been purposefully designed, making 410 Trousdale a truly singular modernist retreat in the heart of Beverly Hills.

Where European elegance meets Costa Rican serenity, this exceptional 3-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom sanctuary in the heart of Beverly Hills offers the ultimate private oasis. Located at 2300 Benedict Canyon, the home bathes in incredible natural light and features a unique, spacious layout that is absolutely perfect for a remote work setup or hosting out-of-town guests with effortless privacy. The chef's kitchen is fully equipped with premium Wolf appliances and flows into a living space anchored by a beautiful gas fireplace. Retreat to the classy, European-style bathrooms, featuring a luxurious jacuzzi bathtub and a dedicated steam shower room designed for a true spa-like experience. Modern conveniences abound throughout the home, including a brand-new HVAC system and a top-of-the-line Bosch washer and dryer.The exterior of the property is an entertainer's dream and a wellness retreat rolled into one, recently enhanced with gorgeous new exterior lighting. Step outside to a heated pool, a sun deck, and a built-in barbecue under a covered pergola. A second patio deck sits right off the kitchen with an additional grilling area, making al fresco dining a breeze. Meander through the peaceful grounds, which are dotted with newly planted avocado, lemon, and lime trees. Follow the sounds of nature to a beautiful, private gazebo that serves as an idyllic space dedicated to meditation, yoga, and quiet reflection. Serene, peaceful, and entirely unique, this property offers a rare combination of luxury and tranquility. Welcome home.

The most prolific property in Beverly Park. This is the definition of perfection, from one of the biggest 2 acre flat lots in Beverly Park to the immaculate grounds, not including the 4 acre mountain that sits at the back of the property that can never be built on, to the architecture and interiors, an estate that embodies the very essence of what Beverly Park stands for. The ultimate in private and secure living. This is why the titans of industry choose to call Beverly Park home. Privately set behind the guarded gates of one of Los Angeles' most prestigious enclaves, 77 Beverly Park Lane is a masterclass in architecture by world-renowned William Hablinkski, offering extraordinary privacy and grandeur just minutes from the heart of Beverly Hills. A dramatic arrival unfolds into interiors defined by soaring ceilings, refined architectural detail, expansive volumes, and millions spent on stones and finishes sourced from around the world. Walls of glass frame the surrounding landscape, filling the home with natural light and seamlessly connecting indoor living with the estate's outdoor spaces. Designed for grand-scale entertaining and luxury living, the residence features a multimillion-dollar private theater, an extraordinary wine cellar that may never be completely filled, incredible gym, parking for over 50 cars across the property, and the latest and greatest amenities. Outdoors, multimillions were invested in landscaping by the renowned landscape designer of San Ysidro Ranch. Resort-caliber grounds showcase manicured lawns, lush rose and vegetable gardens, and entertaining terraces with multiple fire pits, an outdoor kitchen, pizza oven, grills, and dining areas, creating a private oasis. 77 Beverly Park Lane stands as a true trophy estate and a rare opportunity to experience the pinnacle of privacy, prestige, and architectural excellence in Beverly Park. Properties of this caliber very rarely ever come up. Call for a private showing. All buyers must be qualified and verified.

Within The Summit, a guard-gated community in Beverly Hills, and set behind its own private gate, this recently completed modern traditional estate occupies a rare full acre - open canyon to one side, and 270 degrees of Los Angeles laid out in its entirety to the other. The land alone is extraordinary. Two expansive grass areas, mature olive and fruit trees, a cobblestone motor court accommodating twelve vehicles, and a hedge-lined drive that reveals the house slowly and deliberately. Inside, nearly 10,000 square feet is organized around a soaring family room with exceptional volume and natural light. The kitchen anchors the home around an oversized honed stone island and rift oak cabinetry. Two dining rooms - one formal, one enclosed in glass on three sides with the canyon as its permanent backdrop. A bar with floor-to-ceiling built-in shelving opens directly to the outdoors. A private theater. An elevator connecting the floors. Five bedroom suites in the main house, including two with lofts. The primary suite is in a category of its own - massive in scale, with private terraces, his and hers closets, a bonus room, and dual baths with soaking tub and separate showers. Among the finest primary suites in Los Angeles. Outside, terraced stone descends to an infinity pool and spa flush at the horizon. Beyond the main house - a fully detached guest residence with its own bedroom and bath, and a fully detached gym of serious scale with views and bath - a space that could equally serve as a second guest studio. An enclosed game pavilion completes the compound. Approximately 2,000 additional square feet, bringing the full property to approximately 12,000 square feet of living space. Minutes from Beverly Hills, West Hollywood, and Studio City - private when you want it, connected when you don't. The Summit also offers its own private gated access to some of Los Angeles' most sought-after hiking trails. Shown only to prequalified clients.

Once the storied Beverly Hills estate of Hollywood legend James Cagney, this rare and formerly celebrity-owned gated compound presents a once-in-a-generation opportunity to acquire a historic luxury estate in Beverly Hills 90210. Tucked privately beneath Franklin Canyon Nature Reserve, this expansive multi-residence Beverly Hills compound spans more than five acres of secured gated grounds, offering an unheard-of combination of acreage, provenance, and seclusion. Extensively renovated, updated and restored over many years, the private gated estate unfolds as a village-like enclave with multiple residences connected by hand-laid stone pathways winding through tiered citrus gardens, sculptural courtyards, candle-carved stone walls, and museum-quality European statuary. Mature landscaping and curated outdoor rooms create a timeless environment ideal for both intimate living and large-scale entertaining. The "Main Villa" is a romantic architectural centerpiece featuring reclaimed European terracotta roof tiles, exposed trussed-beam cathedral ceilings, leaded glass windows, and multiple restored original fireplaces. Designed for seamless entertaining, the home flows effortlessly from wine cellar and butler's pantry to formal dining and elegant yet warm living rooms, evoking timeless character. This main villa residence offers two primary bedroom suites with couture-scale closets and both suites include grand ensuite baths, soaking tubs, double vanities, step in showers for two, while an additional guest bedroom suite features luxurious cedar closet dressing room and en suite bath. Additional structural assets across the estate compound include a secluded guest residence known as "The Boathouse,"  with wood floors and trussed beams of antique 19th Century reclaimed French Oak complete with its own private gated drive and porte-cochre, ideal as an event venue, creative retreat, or production studio. "The Carriage House-Artist's Studio," is a multipurpose creative studio with full kitchen, en suite bath and auto garages. Plus an additional detached "Guest Cottage", which was Cagney's original art studio where he complete many collection paintings but now renovated to include a full kitchen and en suite bath. This epic compound provides multiple self-contained living environments, making this an exceptional multi-generational Beverly Hills estate uniquely versatile. Other features and amenities include separate regulation tennis and pickleball courts with grandfathered night lighting, a tennis spectator pavilion with wet bar, a glass-tile swimming pool and spa with poolside cabana and outdoor dining bistro. The Pavillion and Pool Cabana each include a fully equipped outdoor chef's kitchen. Expansive flat lawns and play fields offer rare recreational space within the hills above Sunset Boulevard. A true trophy property, the former James Cagney Estate stands as a legacy Beverly Hills estate where architecture, landscape, and artistry converge, perfectly suited for multigenerational living, artists-in-residence, or those seeking an irreplaceable Hollywood history estate in one of Los Angeles' most exclusive enclaves.

The ultimate celebrity compound. Above Beverly Hills, where privacy is paramount and scale is rare, 2571 Wallingford Drive makes an immediate statement. Set within one of the city's most secure gated enclaves, this newly rebuilt estate spans five acres on a commanding promontory, opening to sweeping mountain views and complete seclusion. With two separate access points, arrivals and departures remain discreet, keeping paparazzi and onlookers always guessing. The residence unfolds across approximately 38,000 square feet, with 12 bedrooms and 24 baths designed with a focus on volume, light, and precision. Living and entertaining spaces are expansive yet controlled, blending modern systems with timeless finishes and all the latest and greatest amenities. A separate guesthouse, a caretaker residence, and a dedicated guardhouse create a true compound with layered privacy. The estate is built for both collection and recreation. A 12-car garage is paired with additional parking for up to 80 vehicles. The indoor sports complex rivals a private club, featuring basketball and pickleball courts, a full gym, lounge, and bar. Outdoors, a zero-edge pool stretches toward the horizon, framing the landscape and reinforcing the sense of calm that defines the property. Mature grounds surround the home, offering quiet moments within a setting designed for scale. Minutes from the Beverly Hills Hotel and within easy reach of Van Nuys Private Airport, this is a rare combination of access, security, and presence in one of Los Angeles' most tightly held locations.

Situated on one of the LARGEST lots in the prestigious Beverly Hills Flats, this beautifully updated 5 bedroom, 6 bathroom estate spans over 6,130 square feet of comfortable living space designed for both everyday living and entertaining. Set on an impressive 22,669 square foot lot, the resort style backyard features a sparkling pool, expansive grounds, and a versatile sports court for tennis, pickleball, volleyball, or basketball, perfect for the athletic enthusiast or active lifestyle. A standout feature is the expansive two story GUEST HOUSE with its own private entrance, OFFERING 1 BEDROOM, 2 NEW BATHROOMS, a spacious living room, and full kitchen, ideal for guests, extended family, office space, or a private retreat. Complete with a 3 car garage and additional parking for five or more vehicles. Located in the highly sought after Beverly Hills school district and just moments from premier dining, shopping, and houses of worship, this is a rare opportunity to own one of the Beverly Hills Flats' most impressive oversized lots.

Nestled in one of Beverly Hills' most prestigious enclaves, on just over half an acre, this breathtaking modern estate seamlessly blends timeless elegance with contemporary luxury. The striking white facade, framed by lush greenery and mature trees, sets the stage for an exceptional living experience. Designed by Tim Campbell for both grand entertaining and intimate gatherings, the 13,000 SF home boasts a thoughtfully curated open-concept layout with seamless indoor-outdoor flow. With 9 ensuite bedrooms and 10 bathrooms, this estate offers an unparalleled level of comfort and sophistication. The primary suite is a true retreat, featuring dual bathrooms and dual walk-in closets, creating a private sanctuary of luxury. A detached guest house with a private bedroom provides additional space for visitors or extended stays. Outside to discover a resort-style backyard, complete with a pool, cascading waterfall, and spa. A poolside cabana and expansive patio space invite effortless al fresco dining and lounging, while the large, flat lawn provides ample space for recreation and relaxation. Every detail of this residence has been meticulously designed to offer the finest in modern living, making it the perfect home for those who appreciate style, comfort, and world-class amenities.

Tucked away within the prestigious guard-gated enclave of Hidden Valley, this exceptional Beverly Hills estate offers a rare combination of privacy, serenity, and timeless elegance. Set behind its own gates on a sprawling nearly one-acre lot, the residence is introduced by a picturesque brick-lined pathway, where a vine-draped trellis and charming fountain create a memorable sense of arrival amid expansive manicured grounds. The interiors are defined by an effortless sense of scale and connection, with French doors throughout inviting natural light and garden views into nearly every room. A gracious living room anchored by a carved stone fireplace and custom built-ins opens directly to the grounds, while the formal dining room is equally suited for intimate dinners and larger gatherings, offering direct access to both the gardens and an adjoining patio. The chef's kitchen is fully equipped with an oversized center island, professional-grade stainless-steel appliances, and a cozy fireplace. A separate staircase off the kitchen leads to two secondary bedrooms with a shared bath, creating an ideal accommodation for guests, extended family, or live-in staff. On the opposite wing of the home, two additional en-suite bedrooms are complemented by an expansive den with a wet bar. Occupying its own level, the primary suite serves as a true sanctuary, complete with a balcony overlooking the lush landscape, dual walk-in closets, and a beautifully renovated bath appointed with dual vanities, a soaking tub, and a separate shower. Every bathroom throughout the residence has been recently renovated with sophisticated finishes and a timeless design sensibility. Beyond the interiors, the outdoor setting unfolds as a peaceful escape enveloped by mature landscaping and meticulously manicured greenery. Centered around a sparkling pool, the outdoor spaces offer multiple destinations for relaxation and entertaining, from sun-drenched lounging areas to outdoor dining terraces and a barbecue area. A two-car garage and expansive motor court provide ample parking. Located within one of Beverly Hills' most exclusive communities, this remarkable property presents a rare opportunity to enjoy seclusion, security, and an unparalleled lifestyle.

Privately set on a quiet Beverly Hills cul-de-sac just 10 minutes from Rodeo Drive, this 2021-built contemporary estate showcases spectacular 180-degree canyon, city, Wilshire Corridor, and ocean views framed by the Santa Monica Mountains. Tall ceilings and an open-concept floor plan with floor-to-ceiling Fleetwood pocket doors create a seamless indoor-outdoor flow filled with natural light. The sleek black Poliform kitchen is appointed with Miele, Gaggenau, and Dacor appliances, while premium Poliform built-in cabinetry is featured throughout the home. Upstairs offers four bedrooms with the potential for a fifth, including a luxurious primary suite with a spa-like bath, expansive walk-in closet, dedicated shoe closet, and a versatile exercise/massage room. Additional features include a custom movie theater with Starlight Headliner ceilings and snack bar, two custom-built safes, a guest suite, an oversized RV-height garage, a gated driveway, putt putt, a built-in fire pit and bbq, and ample street parking.

Newly constructed Mediterranean estate situated on an expansive, approximately 15,500-square-foot flat lot on one of the most coveted streets in the prestigious 700 block of the Beverly Hills Flats. Gated and private with a circular imported marble motor court and striking architectural presence. Approximately 11,446 square feet of living space spanning three levels, all serviced by a private elevator, featuring soaring ceilings, grand-scale rooms, and a seamless open-concept floor plan. Elegant formal living room and spacious family room flow effortlessly into the gourmet chef's kitchen, appointed with premium Sub-Zero and Wolf appliances and an adjacent breakfast room. Seven generously sized bedroom suites, including an extraordinary approximately 1,900-square-foot primary retreat featuring a separate sitting room, hidden room, expansive private balcony, dual walk-in closets, and exquisite book-matched stone slabs. Spectacular lower entertainment level featuring a media room, fitness center, lounge, and full bar designed for entertaining on any scale. Resort-inspired rear grounds highlighted by a sparkling pool and spa, outdoor kitchen, cabana, and multiple areas for relaxation and entertaining. Fully integrated smart home automation system with professional-grade whole-house audio. Interiors curated and designed by Restoration Hardware. Furnishings available separately. The property is alarmed and under 24 hour Video Surveillance.

Introducing The Palm at Loma Linda -- an extraordinary sanctuary nestled on a quiet cul-de-sac in the heart of Beverly Hills Proper, where sweeping panoramic views and lush, resort-like grounds transport you to your very own Palm Springs-inspired oasis. Perched on over half an acre of land, this sophisticated contemporary estate captures breathtaking city to ocean vistas from every room, blending the serenity of a private retreat with the prestige of a coveted neighborhood surrounded by $40M+ estates, a true testament to its exceptional long term value. Designed for effortless indoor-outdoor living, this 5 bed/6 bath estate features an airy, open floor plan anchored by a striking central atrium that bathes the formal living spaces in natural light. The expansive living and dining areas flow seamlessly into a chef's kitchen featuring dual islands and top of the line appliances perfect for grand scale entertaining or intimate gatherings. Outdoors, a flat grassy yard, infinity-edge pool, spa, and outdoor kitchen are framed by uninterrupted views and mature palms, creating a setting that feels worlds away yet just minutes from the best of Beverly Hills. Whether you move right in or reimagine and elevate the estate further, The Palm on Loma Linda offers a rare opportunity to craft a dream compound in one of Beverly Hills' most private and sought after enclaves.

Set across more than 10.5 gated acres along iconic Mulholland Drive, Villa Colibri is a rare resort-caliber compound estate defined by its very own private 24-hole par-3 golf course, expansive outdoor amenities, and sweeping canyon, lake, and mountain views. Designed for large-scale entertaining and private enjoyment alike, the estate offers an exceptional lifestyle experience seldom found in Beverly Hills. The grounds are the centerpiece featuring a professionally designed golf course by Dean Reinmuth, a regulation tennis court with illuminated pavilion, two pickleball courts, bocce court, and multiple resort-style water features including two swimming pools, reflecting and wading pools, a waterfall, and fountains. Formal gardens, citrus groves, manicured lawns, and a series of terraces create a park-like setting ideal for hosting events ranging from intimate gatherings to large celebrations. A stately dual-gated entrance, including separate service access, leads to an expansive motor court with substantial on-site parking capacity well-suited for large-scale entertaining. The main residence reflects classic European design, offering grand scale, volume, and timeless architectural detailing throughout. A dramatic great room with approximately 30-foot ceilings, coffered detailing, and dual sweeping staircases serves as the focal point of the home. Interior finishes include limestone, marble, and hardwood flooring, complemented by custom fireplaces, imported antique elements, and designer lighting. The chef's kitchen is equipped for both daily use and catered events, featuring an oversized island, professional-grade appliances, butler's pantry, and a full secondary prep kitchen. Retractable glass walls open to expansive terraces, creating seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Additional amenities include a library/den, theatre lounge with bar, fitness studio, staff quarters, and a temperature-controlled wine cellar. The upper level is dedicated to two primary suites with private terraces and spa-style baths, connected by a loft-style walkway. Five additional en-suite bedrooms are located on the main level with separate access points for guests or staff. A detached guest residence with its own pool, kitchen, and accommodations provides flexibility for extended stays or hosting. Villa Colibri represents a rare opportunity to acquire a large-scale, amenity-rich compound in a prime Beverly Hills location, offering privacy, land, and a full suite of recreational and entertaining features.

Set on a quiet hillside in Beverly Hills, this Colab House residence captures sweeping views that stretch from the city skyline to the surrounding hills. Gated and surrounded by mature landscaping, the home blends modern design with complete privacy. The main level features soaring ceilings, an open floor plan, and walls of glass that create a seamless connection to the outdoors. The chef's kitchen with high-end appliances opens to the family room, dining area, and bar, making the space ideal for both everyday living and entertaining. Upstairs, the primary suite includes a sitting area, walk-in closet, and spa-like bath with uninterrupted views. A gym, office, and guest suite complete the second floor. The backyard is designed as a private retreat, with a spacious lawn, infinity-edge pool, spa, and sunken fire pitall perfectly positioned to take in stunning sunsets. Fully automated with Savant technology, this home combines modern comfort and striking architecture in one of Beverly Hills' most desirable locations.

This stylish Mid-Century Modern 3BD + 2BA home is currently the lowest-priced property in Beverly Hills Post Office. Offering an incredible opportunity to own a single-family residence for less than many condos. Why pay high Beverly Hills HOA fees when you can enjoy the privacy, space, and freedom of your own home ! Step into a light-filled open living room featuring hardwood floors and a fireplace. All seamlessly flowing into a stylishly updated kitchen with stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and a breakfast peninsula. Sliding glass doors from the living and dining areas open to a private patio w/BBQ perfect for a weekend bbq, friends and family gatherings, or entertaining. Upstairs, two bedrooms showcase charming wood-beamed ceilings and updated bathroom, off the carport a separate area or possible 3rd bedroom currently used as an office w/inside laundry attached. The primary suite features its own private outdoor sundeck retreat. Ideally located just minutes from both Beverly Hills. This home delivers the best of location, lifestyle, and value all without the burden of HOA fees.

A dual-entry motor court paved in stone sets the stage for arrival, framed by a striking wood-slatted facade and seamless glass balconies that lend the residence its warm modern presence. The approach unfolds with quiet confidence, introducing interiors defined by grand proportions, plastered walls, and meticulously crafted millwork that carries continuity throughout the home. Inside, the main level reveals a sequence of expansive gathering spaces designed for both scale and intimacy. A formal living room wrapped entirely in floor-to-ceiling glass draws natural light deep into the home, while the adjacent dining room connects discreetly to the chef's kitchen. Here, bespoke stone walls and countertops meet custom oak cabinetry, anchored by two dramatic waterfall islands that serve as both workspace and social centerpiece. Wolf, Miele, and Sub-Zero appliances integrate seamlessly within the design, while a casual dining area sits just beyond. The kitchen transitions effortlessly into a generous family room centered around a ribbed-detail fireplace, with towering pocket glass doors dissolving the boundary between interior living and the surrounding grounds. A sculptural staircase  elegantly curved and extending across three floors  acts as a visual anchor, its glass ceiling above filtering daylight downward, while an elevator provides effortless access to every level. Above, a library-style lounge at the landing connects the primary suite with three additional bedroom suites, each offering walk-in closets and beautifully appointed baths, with the largest featuring a private patio overlooking Alpine. The primary suite serves as a peaceful retreat with a ribbed fireplace and a covered wraparound terrace. Its boutique-style dressing room leads to a marble bathroom with dual vanities, soaking tub, and oversized rainfall shower, where glass walls open directly to the terrace and backyard beyond. The lower level unfolds around a dramatic double-height glass courtyard, where a living olive tree rises beside a vertical green wall to create a serene natural centerpiece. Arranged around this space are a series of gathering and lifestyle areas including a large lounge with billiards, a marble bar with dual wine refrigerators, and a dedicated theater. A private office and library open to their own patio for quiet work or reading, while wellness amenities include a fitness studio, sauna, and steam room. This floor also accommodates a guest bedroom with walk-in closet and en-suite bath sharing the library patio, along with a laundry room and three full bathrooms. Outdoors, a long covered patio with integrated heating and an outdoor kitchen anchors the grounds, complemented by a pool, spa, outdoor shower, and multiple lounge areas designed for relaxed entertaining. Located within the Beverly Hills Flats, the residence places the city's most celebrated shopping, dining, and cultural destinations just minutes away, along with access to top-rated schools and community amenities.

property.description: The number one best iconic 2.2-acre view property in the city that has it all. In the heart of Beverly Hills, just minutes from the legendary Beverly Hills Hotel, 1309 Davies Way delivers total privacy, panoramic city views, and a level of refinement reserved for the truly exceptional. Set on its own private promontory and located adjacent to the Pritzker, Murdoch, and future Gates family estates, this Modern Tuscan masterpiece is steeped in rare Hollywood legacy. Once home to Ricky Martin for many years, previously owned by English actor Michael Caine, and before that held by Doris Day's family, the estate carries an iconic lineage that mirrors its stature. Behind gates, a long, curving, tree-lined drive builds cinematic anticipation before opening to a grand motor court. Recently reimagined through a multi-year renovation, the residence blends timeless Mediterranean romance with modern precision, offering a living experience that feels both classic and commanding. Inside, walls of glass frame explosive head-on city and coastal views stretching across the city to the Pacific. Nearly every primary room, terrace, and outdoor retreat is oriented to the horizon, creating a constant dialogue between architecture and landscape. By day, the home is flooded with light; by night, it hovers above a constellation of city lights. The grounds unfold like a private resort: expansive lawns, manicured gardens, orchard, guest house, and a championship tennis court with pavilion, all designed for grand-scale entertaining and effortless SoCal living. The great room and chef's kitchen open directly to the outdoors, while a private theater and spa-level amenities complete the experience. The primary suite is a sanctuary in the sky, featuring its own terrace, sitting room, dual baths and dressing rooms, and flexible spaces tailored to a world-class lifestyle. Private, gated, and irreplaceable in location, history, and view, 1309 Davies Way is not just a residence, it's a legacy estate reserved for the few.

Perched high within the legendary hills of Trousdale Estates, where architecture becomes art and the horizon feels endless, a residence conceived by visionary architect Harry Gesner takes form. Bold, sculptural, and unmistakable, 624 Cole Place is a master expression of mid-century modern design, positioned to capture panoramic jetliner views from Beverly Hills to Catalina Island and across the valley. From arrival, the home emerges from the hillside with quiet authority. Signature rooflines soar overhead, and walls of glass dissolve into the horizon as natural light moves freely from dawn to dusk. Gesner believed architecture should live in conversation with nature, and here the skyline becomes a permanent part of the interior experience. Each space unfolds with intention, offering its own perspective and relationship to the view. From intimate corners to grand entertaining spaces, the city reveals itself in layers, constantly shifting, always spectacular. Daily living becomes cinematic. Hosting feels effortless. Even silence feels elevated. Outside, expansive terraces float above the landscape, while the pool provides a front-row seat to Los Angeles by day and a glittering sea of lights by night. It is Southern California indoor-outdoor living at its most refined. Offered for the first time in over two decades, the residence reflects a level of architecture that tends to be held, not traded.

Set behind elegant iron gates on a tree-lined stretch of the coveted Flats of Beverly Hills, 906 N Beverly Drive is nothing short of a masterpiece - an artfully curated Mediterranean revival estate that has been completely reimagined into one of the most extraordinary residences to come to market in years. Designed by the acclaimed Carlyle Designs, every inch of this home has been crafted with an obsessive devotion to materiality and light, cascading through custom metal and cast textured glass skylights that wash the interiors in a warmth that feels truly cinematic. Step inside and you're immediately enveloped in matte Venetian plaster walls and herringbone European oak floors - a layered palette that feels both ancient and utterly of-the-moment. The kitchen is a showstopper: designed and fabricated by the legendary Belgian atelier Obumex, it features dramatic Calacatta Vagli Extra marble and a full suite of Sub-Zero, Wolf, and Lacanche appliances - professional-grade performance wrapped in gallery-worthy beauty. The primary hers bathroom is in a category of its own, anchored by a 2,000-pound hand-carved Arabescato Gold marble bathtub sourced from Belgium - a sculptural statement that belongs in a museum. Three fireplaces, custom closets, a Control4 smart home system, and a motorized ceiling-concealed TV in the family room round out an interior that is as livable as it is breathtaking. Step outside and discover a resort-calibrated backyard where a sparkling lap pool stretches toward a 761 sf guest house - private, polished, and perfect. This is the Flats at its absolute finest, and an opportunity that simply will not come again.

Introducing an exceptional opportunity in the prestigious Flats of Beverly Hills, this freshly renovated contemporary estate embodies modern luxury, sophistication, and elevated California living. Featuring 6 spacious bedrooms and 9 designer bathrooms, the residence offers an extraordinary blend of architectural elegance and world-class amenities in one of Beverly Hills' most coveted neighborhoods.A dramatic light-filled foyer opens to expansive entertaining spaces highlighted by rare wood flooring, custom marble inlays, soaring ceilings, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Floor-to-ceiling electronic glass doors disappear effortlessly, revealing a resort-style outdoor setting complete with an oversized terrace, sparkling pool, multiple lounge areas, and ambient lighting designed for unforgettable entertaining.At the heart of the home, the stunning Boffi chef's kitchen showcases Carrara marble floors, black basalt countertops, and top-of-the-line Gaggenau appliances, delivering both functionality and timeless design for intimate living or large-scale hosting. A spacious hotel-style office adds an elevated executive feel, perfectly suited for today's luxury lifestyle.The luxurious primary suite serves as a private retreat featuring its own fireplace, wet bar, custom dressing room, dual spa-inspired bathrooms adorned with striking marble slabs and bespoke finishes, and direct access to an expansive rooftop deck perfect for a private lounge and entertaining area. A private elevator and sculptural glass staircase connect every level of the residence, leading to an exceptional collection of amenities including a state-of-the-art movie theater, wellness/yoga space, and a private guest house that could also serve as a gym or media room.Completing the estate is an expansive oversized garage accommodating up to 8 vehicles, ideal for collectors and luxury enthusiasts alike. Blending sleek contemporary architecture with timeless elegance, this remarkable Beverly Hills residence offers a rare chance to experience the ultimate luxury lifestyle. Ideally located in a prime Beverly Hills location, the property is within walking distance to world-class shopping, renowned restaurants, and Rodeo Drive.

This remarkably tasteful custom 2019-built 3-level Traditional on a world-renowned road is available for sale for the first time. Featuring super high ceilings, incredible materials, exquisite stone and herringbone wood floors, detailed mouldings, wainscoting, built-ins, and smart-home technology. Grand and gracious 2sty entry with inlaid marble floors, clerestory windows, and a sweeping staircase flows perfectly to the gallery hall, stunning library/living, dining, and family rooms. Beautiful elevator and secondary staircases to all floors. Phenomenal main and prep kitchens with top stainless appliances. Kitchen opens to major dining and family rooms which lead to a wide covered/heated patio and resort-style private grounds with patios, pool, spa, fountain, pergola, outdoor shower, and pool house (guest unit) with bath. 4 (or 5) bedroom suites upstairs displaying bathrooms as "works-of-art". Substantial primary retreat with large office (possible 5th upstairs bedroom), 2 walk-ins, 2 luxe baths, fireplace, and an amazing nearly 60ft wide rear balcony with treetop views. Enormous secluded main floor bedroom suite could readily be a 2nd primary. Lower level features natural light, 2 big bedroom suites, a comfortable central entertaining space, wine cellar, and direct access to an enormous 5 car subterranean garage (nearly 1,300SF) and large storage room. Two separate laundry spaces (2nd floor and lower level) for convenience. Sited just moments from internationally acclaimed shopping, dining, hotels, medical services, and entertainment, the epitome of a luxurious lifestyle resides here. Shown only to highly pre-qualified buyers.

9422 Readcrest Drive, Beverly Hills CA 90210. Perched quietly above the city in the "Crest Streets", one of Los Angeles' most coveted hillside enclaves, this fully remodeled architectural retreat offers the rare feeling of a true luxury pied--terre suspended in the sky. Hidden behind clean modern lines and surrounded by lush canyon landscapes, the residence was designed for those who crave privacy, serenity, and effortless sophistication just minutes from Beverly Hills and the Sunset Strip. From the moment you arrive, the mood shifts. Soft architectural lighting, textured stone walls, and minimalist design create a calming sense of arrival reminiscent of a boutique hotel in the hills of Ibiza or the South of France. Inside, walls of glass frame sweeping canyon and city vistas while filling the interiors with natural light and breathtaking sunsets that feel cinematic every evening. The open-concept living spaces are warm, modern, and intentionally understated  allowing the views, light, and atmosphere to become the true luxury. Wide-plank oak floors, custom finishes, and sleek European-inspired details blend seamlessly with expansive terraces designed for intimate dinners, morning coffee above the clouds, or quiet nights under the stars. Thoughtfully designed with two private bedroom suites on separate levels, and a den that could be modified to become a 3rd ensuite guest room, the home offers ideal flexibility for sophisticated living, hosting guests, creative work-from-home environments, or a lock-and-leave lifestyle for those traveling between cities. Each suite feels like its own secluded sanctuary, enhancing the home's peaceful, retreat-like energy. Exceptionally quiet and remarkably private, this is a home for the buyer who values discretion, design, and experience over excess  a refined modern escape that captures the essence of elevated Los Angeles living.

Perched along one of the most coveted and prestigious streets in Beverly Hills, within the exclusive enclave of Beverly Hills proper, this newly reimagined single-story estate is a masterclass in contemporary architecture, privacy, and elevated California living. Privately gated and commanding approximately 175 feet of prominent street frontage, the residence makes an unforgettable first impression with striking architectural lines, tranquil water features, and an arrival experience reminiscent of a world-class luxury resort. A sculptural pivot entry door opens to an atmosphere of understated sophistication, where walls of disappearing Fleetwood glass dissolve the boundaries between interior and exterior spaces, flooding the home with natural light while framing lush greenery and serene hillside vistas. Designed with an uncompromising commitment to scale, flow, and refinement, the interiors are accented by soaring tray ceilings, expansive porcelain surfaces, and dramatic statement finishes throughout. The main living spaces unfold effortlessly for both intimate daily living and grand-scale entertaining, anchored by a breathtaking bookmatched stone fireplace that serves as a true architectural centerpiece. Multiple luxurious bedroom suites offer the ambiance of private retreats, each appointed with bespoke spa-inspired bathrooms, generous custom wardrobe spaces, and seamless access to the resort-caliber outdoor grounds. At the heart of the estate lies a spectacular designer kitchen curated for the most discerning culinary enthusiast, featuring dual islands, custom European cabinetry, an exceptional suite of Miele appliances including steam and speed ovens, separate induction and gas cooking stations, integrated espresso system, dual Bosch dishwashers, and professional-grade Sub-Zero refrigeration. Nearby, an elegant entertainer's lounge is complemented by a striking temperature-controlled glass wine display and a sophisticated bar experience designed for effortless hosting. Every aspect of the home has been thoughtfully integrated with state-of-the-art smart home technology, allowing seamless control of lighting, audio, climate, and security systems with precision and ease. The outdoor setting evokes the feeling of a private boutique retreat, complete with expansive entertaining terraces, multiple lounge and viewing areas, a sparkling resort-style pool and spa, and lush manicured lawns surrounded by mature landscaping and complete privacy. A spacious motor court further enhances the estate's exceptional functionality and presence. Located just moments from Rodeo Drive, Sunset Boulevard, world-renowned dining, luxury boutiques, premier hotels, and the unmatched services of the Beverly Hills Police Department and Beverly Hills Fire Department, this extraordinary residence embodies the rare combination of prestige, architectural significance, and effortless modern luxury in one of the most iconic addresses in the world.

Newly completed construction, The Elm Estate is a masterfully reimagined modern Spanish residence in the heart of Beverly Hills, where timeless architecture meets impeccable contemporary design. Originally rooted in the elegance of the 1920s and now fully transformed through a comprehensive 2026 renovation, this extraordinary estate offers approximately 6,172 square feet of refined living across 5 bedrooms and 7 bathrooms. Every detail has been thoughtfully curated to honor its architectural heritage while introducing the highest level of modern luxury. Set behind a tall privacy hedge and classic wrought iron gates, a romantic courtyard sets the tone, welcoming you into a home defined by effortless indoor-outdoor living.  A dramatic entry stair hall, bathed in natural light and adorned with custom woodwork, creates an unforgettable first impression. The main level unfolds with grace and scale. A grand living room, crowned by wood-beamed ceilings, arched windows, and a statement marble fireplace, flows seamlessly into a sophisticated formal dining room and an elegant wine room designed for elevated entertaining. At the heart of the home, the gourmet kitchen is a true showpiece, anchored by a striking 12-foot marble island and appointed with a full suite of top-tier appliances, including a Sub-Zero refrigerator/freezer, 48-inch Wolf range, additional oven and microwave, dual sinks, and bespoke hardware.  A thoughtfully designed pantry with a secondary refrigerator enhances both function and ease, while the kitchen opens beautifully to the family room, where an entire wall of pocket doors vanishes to reveal a seamless transition to the outdoor entertaining terrace, complete with custom cabinetry. The first level is completed by an oversized laundry room and a versatile media or game room, offering both comfort and flexibility. Upstairs, the primary suite is a private sanctuary...serene, expansive, and exquisitely appointed, featuring a luxurious marble bath and dual boutique-style dressing rooms. Three additional en suite bedrooms provide both privacy and sophistication. An attached pool house adds exceptional versatility, thoughtfully designed with a gym and wellness space ideal for guests, fitness, or a private office. Perfectly positioned on the coveted 600 block of Elm Drive, surrounded by some of Beverly Hills' most distinguished estates, The Elm Estate is a rare and iconic offering that seamlessly blends historic character with modern refinement in one of the city's most prestigious enclaves.

This designer built 3 bedroom, 3 bath contemporary home is tucked away in the coveted Beverly Hills Post Office, offering privacy, thoughtful design, and modern functionality. Fully remodeled down to the studs, the home features a seamless open layout where the chef's kitchen, complete with Thermador appliances and Brazilian quartzite countertops, flows effortlessly into the living space and out to an inviting deck, ideal for indoor outdoor living. Bathrooms are finished with Italian marble and refined brass fixtures, while the primary suite offers abundant natural light and a spa like bath with a tranquil outdoor outlook. Two additional bedrooms include a well appointed guest room and a separate lower level suite with a private entrance and ensuite bath, offering flexibility for guests, a studio, or workspace. Surrounded by canyon greenery, the outdoor spaces include multiple areas for dining and lounging, creating a quiet retreat just minutes from Beverly Hills, the Beverly Hills Hotel, and Rodeo Drive. Additional features include a two car garage and rare off street parking.

Set along the most iconic stretch of North Roxbury Drive, The Roxbury Estate is a rare generational offering defined by timeless architecture, grand scale, and enduring pedigree. Situated behind gates on an expansive, flat 29,000-square-foot lot, this extraordinary Beverly Hills Villa spans over 10,500 square feet and represents one of the most distinguished legacy estates within the city's most coveted enclave. A dramatic entry introduces interiors of remarkable volume and elegance, where soaring ceilings, rich architectural detailing, and oversized French doors create a seamless blend of classic European design and effortless California living. Designed for both refined entertaining and everyday comfort, the residence offers an exceptional collection of formal and informal living spaces, including a magnificent step-down living room, formal dining salon, and beautifully curated gathering areas throughout. The estate features six luxurious bedroom suites, including an extraordinary primary retreat with a stunning oversized marble bath, custom wardrobes, and a serene garden view. Every space has been thoughtfully designed to balance grandeur with warmth and livability. Outdoors, the grounds evoke the ambiance of a private Mediterranean resort, surrounded by stunning landscape design, mature olive trees, manicured hedges, and romantic garden pathways. Lush gardens frame a sparkling pool and spa, multiple outdoor entertaining spaces, and a spectacular open-air pavilion with soaring wood-beamed ceilings and arched colonnades overlooking the resort-like setting. Designed as an elegant outdoor living salon and entertaining retreat, the space seamlessly blends indoor and outdoor living on a grand scale. A tranquil fountain courtyard further enhances the estate's timeless charm and serenity. Located on Beverly Hills' most legendary street, The Roxbury Estate is far more than a residence, it is a landmark legacy property offering an extraordinary opportunity to own a piece of Beverly Hills history.

Rare chance to own Tim Morrison's Spanish Revival estate, which embodies the essence of California's Golden Age of Architecture. Situated north of Sunset in Beverly Hills, this stunning property features breathtaking views from the ocean to downtown and overlooks the hills and Franklin Canyon. The estate showcases exquisite finishes and impressive space, including a master suite with incredible views, a sitting room, and dual baths. The top floor has three additional bedroom suites, a gym, and a home theater featuring state of the art sound and projection. The lower level boasts a chef's kitchen, family room, formal living and dining rooms, a study, and a guest suite. With a three-car garage and ample parking, the private grounds include a beautiful shell-shaped pool and decks, all framed by spectacular views. This one acre promontory rests at the end of a cul-de-sac in prime Beverly Hills (Area 1).

Set behind gates and nestled in one of the most coveted stretches of N. Beverly Dr., this private residence delivers a rare blend of architectural presence and effortless livability. This five-bedroom, office, and four-bathroom home has it all. Designed for both comfort and style, the residence offers direct entry from the garage, soaring ceilings, and interiors flooded with natural light. The seamless indoor-outdoor flow creates an ideal setting for effortless entertaining and everyday living. Remodeled and reinvented by an award-winning designer in 2009, and featured in California Home + Design, the home blends timeless elegance with modern livability. The chef's kitchen is equipped with Viking appliances, Heath and Ann Sacks tile, and was designed for both functionality and beauty. Additional features include an IQ Air systems and multi-zone HVAC for optimal comfort throughout. Ideally located in 90210, just moments from Beverly Hills, the Beverly Hills Hotel, Franklin Canyon hiking trails, and Coldwater Canyon Park.

Iconic Trousdale mid-century modern estate designed by the legendary A. Quincy Jones, FAIA. Set on a nearly 1-acre flat lot, on one of the top 3 best promontory lots in Trousdale, with sweeping unobstructed city to ocean views and one of the biggest flat grassy lawns in Trousdale. Soaring ceilings, a floor plan that is perfect for entertaining, and one of the best views in Trousdale. Secured, private, and a very peaceful setting. Trousdale has a rare few gems, and an architectural marvel like this comes up once in a lifetime. Here is your chance to own a piece of history in the number one location in all of Los Angeles.

A sculptural glass and steel residence by architect Edward R. Niles, 1169 Loma Linda Drive is a rare architectural showpiece set on a private knoll within the City of Beverly Hills. Designed as a living sculpture rather than a conventional estate, the home captures unobstructed city to ocean views from a quiet cul de sac setting with full Beverly Hills city services. Defined by sweeping circular glass walls, a curving steel structure, and a dramatic central courtyard, the residence creates a seamless connection between architecture, light, and landscape. Rare construction documentation further highlights the complexity of its circular steel framework, custom glass engineering, and one of a kind architectural execution. Expansive interiors open to panoramic vistas throughout the home, while the property's distinctive design offers a level of identity and architectural presence seldom found in Beverly Hills today. The residence features six bedrooms, seven bathrooms, a private elevator, seven car garage, infinity edge pool, and light filled indoor outdoor living spaces designed for privacy, entertaining, and everyday living. More than a traditional Beverly Hills home, this is an architectural collector's residence for a buyer seeking design significance, privacy, views, and a truly one-of-a-kind setting. Seller financing may be considered at the seller's sole discretion, subject to terms, pricing, and buyer qualification acceptable to the seller.

Views, style, and privacy converge in this spectacular architectural residence. This home showcases dramatic tall glass walls and floor-to-ceiling windows that frame sweeping city views while flooding the home with natural light. A gated entry courtyard sets the tone for an exceptional entertainer's layout, leading into beautifully bright, open living spaces. The expansive kitchen features high-end appliances, a breakfast bar, and a sunlit nook, seamlessly connecting to formal dining and living areas designed for both comfort and impact. The large, private primary suite offers a true retreat, complete with stunning views, a spa-like bathroom with a soaking tub, and steam shower. Outdoor living is equally impressive. A newly built infinity-edge pool and spa is surrounded by lush greenery for ultimate privacy, complemented by a Brazilian Ipe deck. The backyard also features additional lounging deck, and a sports court. A detached poolside kitchenette with a full bathroom adds flexibility for entertaining. Additional highlights include hardwood floors throughout, recessed lighting, integrated speakers inside and out, alarm systems, and a two-car attached garage.

On a private road off lower Benedict, this exquisite 2.7-acre estate in the City of Beverly Hills stands as a testament to uncompromising luxury and refined taste. Architecture by the renowned William Hablinski, landscape artistry by Robert Truskowski and interiors by the celebrated Roger Thomas. The property's grandeur begins through an elegant gate with a park-like drive leading to the main residence. Upon entry, guests are welcomed into a sophisticated reception area with stylish arrival lounge and bar. The estate unfolds to reveal a grand living room with city light views, an expansive indoor/outdoor main dining area, the owner's office, a full Bel-Air Circuit capable digital Cinema, a spa suite, and large gymnasium. An elevator ensures effortless navigation throughout the residence. The owner's suite has dual amenities. Four en-suite guest bedrooms and a guest lanai suite with a full kitchen and living room provide ample space for visitors. The estate also includes three staff bedrooms with a dedicated kitchen and two security team bedrooms with a kitchenette. Outdoor amenities are equally impressive, featuring a professional tennis court with an air-conditioned seating house and kitchenette, an air-conditioned pool lanai house with kitchen, and meticulously landscaped grounds. This Beverly Hills masterpiece offers a perfect blend of privacy, luxury, and sophisticated living, making it a true jewel in one of the world's most prestigious neighborhoods. Every detail has been carefully considered, from the architectural design to the interior finishes, creating an unparalleled residential experience.

Private Compound Living Situated in the highly coveted Beverly Hills Flats, this gated and fully hedged estate offers a rare blend of privacy, versatility, and refined design all just moments from the best of Beverly Hills. Set behind lush, mature landscaping, the property unfolds as a true compound, where the pace of Doheny Drive fades away, giving way to a serene and private environment. Inside, the main residence features 3 bedrooms and 3.5 bathrooms, thoughtfully designed with elegant proportions, abundant natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The gourmet Italian chef's kitchen is appointed with premium Miele and Gaggenau appliances, ideal for both everyday living and sophisticated entertaining. A standout feature of the property is the detached guest house, offering a fully independent living experience. Complete with 2 bedrooms (one currently styled as an office), a full kitchen, breakfast area, and a dedicated screening/media space, it is perfectly suited for extended family, guests, or a private work-from-home retreat. The home has been recently refreshed, featuring new tile work and thoughtful enhancements throughout, creating a clean, elevated, and move-in-ready environment. The grounds are designed for both comfort and functionality, featuring a Gated and fully enclosed perimeter with mature hedging for ultimate privacy, a Two-car garage plus additional parking for additional vehicles. Dual rear access points for discreet and convenient entry and Expansive outdoor areas ideal for entertaining or relaxation. Additional highlights include a Crestron home automation system, providing seamless control of lighting, media, and comfort throughout the property. Offering the scale, privacy, and flexibility often sought within the Flats, this property presents a distinctive opportunity to enjoy the Beverly Hills lifestyle in a setting that balances accessibility with seclusion. Priced with intention to reflect location while delivering a compelling value relative to nearby interior streets. Property shows as a true private compound; once inside, the hedging and layout significantly buffer street presence and create a quiet, enclosed environment. Prime location offers close proximity to the Sunset Strip lifestyle just moments to Soho House, Bird Streets Club, and premier dining, shopping, and nightlife.

Welcome to "The Dalegrove MCM", a serene mid century modern oasis with pool, privately set in the coveted hills of Beverly Hills Post Office (BHPO). Situated at the end of a quiet cul de sac just off Coldwater Canyon, this single level residence offers a rare blend of privacy, tranquility, and central accessibility to Beverly Hills, West Hollywood, and Ventura Boulevard. Upon entry, you are welcomed by a light filled open floor plan where expansive walls of glass frame lush greenery and create a seamless indoor outdoor living experience. Clean architectural lines and warm finishes define the home, with a refined living and dining area flowing into a Poggenpohl designed kitchen equipped with premium appliances including a Sub Zero refrigerator. Stroll into your private retreat back yard featuring a heated pool and spa, sun drenched lounge areas, and mature landscaping. A built in outdoor kitchen with barbecue and refrigerator creates an ideal setting for entertaining or quiet relaxation. Positioned just far enough from Coldwater Canyon to avoid traffic noise, yet minutes from world class dining, shopping, and lifestyle amenities. Truly a rare opportunity to own a private design driven retreat in one of Los Angeles' most desirable hillside enclaves.

The Sierra House has arrived... Situated on one of the most coveted streets in the Beverly Hills Flats, this classic home seamlessly blends timeless character with modern living. The main floor features a formal living room, dining room, chef's kitchen, wood-paneled study, and a sun-drenched family room that opens to the lush grounds.  French doors lead to a resort-like backyard with a sparkling pool, spa, and a detached guest house currently outfitted as a gym.Upstairs, the primary suite by renowned architect Richard Landry offers a dual-sided fireplace, separate office nook, oversized bath, soaking tub, and dual walk-in closets.  Three additional en-suite bedrooms complete the top level, with a bonus room perfect for a playroom or creative space. Meticulously landscaped for privacy and warmth, The Sierra House combines elegance and comfort, creating the perfect family home.

Discover elevated living in this beautifully appointed 2-bedroom, 2-bath residence tucked away in the coveted Beverly Crest neighborhood. Designed with warmth and sophistication in mind, the home features soaring ceilings, rich hardwood flooring, and a charming fireplace that anchors the inviting living spaces. The chef-inspired kitchen is outfitted with stainless steel appliances, a breakfast bar, and seamless flow into the dining and family areas, ideal for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. Outdoors, enjoy your own private retreat with multiple patios, a terraced hillside, an expansive upper deck, and a serene fountain, all perfectly positioned to capture stunning canyon vistas and sparkling city lights. Additional highlights include central air conditioning, forced-air heating, in-closet laundry, and an attached garage for added comfort and convenience. A rare offering that perfectly captures the elegance, tranquility, and lifestyle of Beverly Hills living.

Welcome to this stunning Mediterranean Gated Villa situated on a prestigious road of lower Beverly Hills PO. This entertainer's paradise includes spacious rooms surrounded by French doors that lead out to a private, fully hedged yard with pool, fire pit and BBQ area, perfect for any events!  Tastefully updated gourmet kitchen with top-of-the-line appliances. Oversized primary suite with a huge walk-in closet and resort like master bath.  Adjacent office/study and 3 additional en-suite bedrooms leads to a gracious private yard completing the 2nd level.  4 car garage with direct access from the street.  This beautiful resort is close to BH shopping, restaurants, Coldwater Park, Franklin Canyon National Park and more.... This is an exceptional opportunity to own a perfect home in a prime location in BHPO.

Privately set behind mature landscaping in the coveted flats of Coldwater Canyon, just north of Sunset Boulevard, this timeless Traditional Ranch presents a rare opportunity in Beverly Hills Proper. Originally built in 1948, the home blends classic architecture with thoughtful updates, offering light-filled, well-proportioned interiors designed for effortless single-level living. A charming circular driveway and manicured grounds create standout curb appeal, while inside, elegant formal living and dining rooms, along with a warm family room with fireplace, provide ideal spaces for both entertaining and everyday living. The chef's kitchen features a center island and breakfast nook, while the spacious primary suite is complete with dressing areas and a generous bath. Additional guest bedrooms offer flexibility, and a guest house (504 sf) sits privately at the rear of the property, just beyond the pool, offering a perfect retreat for visitors or additional living space. A quintessential Beverly Hills offering combining charm, comfort, and enduring value.

A 1.3-acre Moroccan-modern compound designed as a private, high-functioning sanctuary capable of supporting large-scale entertaining, wellness living, and discreet operations 10 minutes to Beverly Hills core (hotel, retail, business)   Gated estate compound with full privacy and layered security Four separate structures enabling flexible use (residence, guests, staff, amenities)Designed for global-caliber hosting and day-to-day seclusion Strategic proximity to  key Westside corridors 9 bedrooms | 14 bathrooms across multiple structures 2,400 sq ft primary suite with full retreat-level separation Three professional-grade kitchens for private use and large events Two-story staff house with independent access.15-car motor court with gated approachApproved plans for pickleball court Existing soccer-field-scale lawn

Located a few blocks north of The Beverly Hills Hotel, this exquisite French-style residence is privately tucked away behind gates and showcases stunning panoramic views from Century City to Downtown. The expansive, nearly 8,400-square-foot floor plan offers four bedrooms and nine bathrooms with palatial living areas, grand ceilings, and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. The main level includes formal living and dining rooms, along with a chef's kitchen equipped with top-of-the-line appliances. On the upper level, the primary suite features a sitting area, dual en suites, ample closets, and a private terrace with jetliner views. This over-half-acre lot is defined by exceptionally manicured grounds, a swimmer's pool, outdoor lounging and dining areas, and a substantial motor court. A truly rare offering in one of the most highly coveted locations in Beverly Hills, just minutes from renowned dining and entertainment.

property.description: Exceptional design meets refined luxury in this brand-new Beverly Hills architectural masterpiece, set behind privacy gates on a secluded promontory with truly explosive panoramic city-to-ocean views offering the rare combination of dramatic vistas and effortless convenience just moments from the Beverly Hills Hotel and the heart of the city.  Created by renowned architect Paul McClean with interiors by Waldo Fernandez, this one-of-a-kind residence is a study in meticulous craftsmanship and elevated modern warmth. Behind the gates, twin marble waterfalls frame a dramatic entry, leading to illuminated travertine paths and a striking glass bridge that reveals the home's stunning three-level design. Walls of glass, soaring wood-paneled ceilings, and contrasting accents create a seamless indoor-outdoor flow reminiscent of the world's finest private resorts. An elevator services all levels, enhancing ease and livability throughout. The main level features formal living and dining areas, a kitchen as well as a chef's kitchen with Miele appliances, wine cellar, and private office. Pocketing glass doors open to an expansive outdoor oasis with a full-length infinity pool, jacuzzi, baja ledge, and multiple dining and lounge areas overlooking the skyline ideal for hosting events, parties, and effortless gatherings with quick access for Uber and pick-ups. The upper level is dedicated to a serene primary retreat with a terrace, fireplace, spa-like bath, and dual closets, as well as a secondary bedroom. Below, a dramatic atrium anchors a complete entertainment and wellness floor with guest suite, gym, sauna, steam room, massage room, onyx bar, and a state-of-the-art private home theater - creating the ultimate "vacation-at-home" lifestyle. The home offers exceptional gated parking capacity, including an oversized garage and additional space within the motor court, providing rare flexibility for events, staff, and guest arrivals, all complemented by generous street frontage for convenient overflow parking. A rare opportunity to own a true trophy property offering unparalleled design, privacy, resort-level amenities, and unmatched proximity to the very best of Beverly Hills.
